installCommand: npm install && cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && (DATABASE_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260422000000_float_to_decimal || true) && DATABASE_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run seed && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
buildCommand: cd frontend && CI=false npm run build
